dialogue.speaker: Jukyung
dialogue.line: Is he a celebrity? I never knew someone like him lived in our neighborhood!

dialogue.speaker: Suho
dialogue.line: I saw it first. It's mine.

dialogue.speaker: Jukyung
dialogue.line: What?

dialogue.speaker: Jukyung
dialogue.line: Is he serious?

dialogue.speaker: Clerk
dialogue.line: That'll be 3,200 won.

dialogue.speaker: Jukyung
dialogue.line: OMG, mind blown.

dialogue.speaker: Jukyung
dialogue.line: Who cares if he thinks he saw it first? How can he act so cocky? Celebrity ass! What about me? What if I saw it first? I can't believe this!

dialogue.speaker: Jukyung
dialogue.line: Ugh, the more I think about it, the more ridiculous it is. What the heck kind of logic is that? He's such a duche!

dialogue.speaker: Jukyung
dialogue.line: Not this...

dialogue.speaker: Jukyung
dialogue.line: Where's my ice cream?

dialogue.speaker: Friend
dialogue.line: Here.

dialogue.speaker: Jukyung
dialogue.line: Thanks~

dialogue.speaker: Friend
dialogue.line: Oh, right. So I hear you've been dating someone.

dialogue.speaker: Jukyung
dialogue.line: Says who?

dialogue.speaker: Jukyung
dialogue.line: She probably looks just like me when she's at home too, you know.

dialogue.speaker: Friend
dialogue.line: No way! Oh God, don't even joke about that; even her breath smells beautiful.

dialogue.speaker: Jukyung
dialogue.line: Aw, you've gotta face the harshness of reality or you'll be disappointed later!

dialogue.speaker: Jukyung
dialogue.line: Go away!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The following day

dialogue.speaker: Jukyung
dialogue.line: Mom, where's my bag?

dialogue.speaker: Mom
dialogue.line: That's not your only bag, you know. Besides, it's not dry yet, so take another one.

dialogue.speaker: Jukyung
dialogue.line: What?! Ugh, but that's my only good bag!

dialogue.speaker: Mom
dialogue.line: What do you mean you only have one good bag? Your old bag is fine. Just take that one today!

dialogue.speaker: Jukyung
dialogue.line: Uh...

dialogue.speaker: Jukyung
dialogue.line: Bag from middle school.

dialogue.speaker: Jukyung
dialogue.line: Who even wears this kind of bag nowadays? Uggghhh, I really don't want to wear it.

dialogue.speaker: Jukyung
dialogue.line: Hope no one notices...

dialogue.speaker: Girl 1
dialogue.line: I was at that K-Pop concert last weekend.

dialogue.speaker: Girl 2
dialogue.line: Wow, lucky! How was it?

dialogue.speaker: Girl 1
dialogue.line: It was amazing! So many boys, gorgeous up close.

dialogue.speaker: Jukyung
dialogue.line: Oh God, I know that face...

dialogue.speaker: Jukyung
dialogue.line: It's that guy from yesterday!

dialogue.speaker: Suho
dialogue.line: I saw it first. It's mine.

dialogue.speaker: Jukyung
dialogue.line: That jerk!

dialogue.speaker: Jukyung
dialogue.line: W-What's he doing at our school?

dialogue.speaker: Student 1
dialogue.line: Was that the new transfer student just now?

dialogue.speaker: Student 2
dialogue.line: Yeah, the cute one everyone's going nuts over. I think his name is Suho Lee or something.

dialogue.speaker: Jukyung
dialogue.line: T-Transfer student?

dialogue.speaker: Student 3
dialogue.line: But I hear he's a real jerk. Hehe.

dialogue.speaker: Student 4
dialogue.line: Right? Not just a jerk, but a sociopath!

dialogue.speaker: Jukyung
dialogue.line: He's a jerk, all right. But I didn't think he'd go to our school.

dialogue.speaker: Jukyung
dialogue.line: What if he recognizes me?

dialogue.speaker: Student 5
dialogue.line: Hehe, I guess it comes with the good looks!

dialogue.speaker: Student 6
dialogue.line: But he's got brains, too. I heard that he was at the top of his class at his old school.

dialogue.speaker: Jukyung
dialogue.line: Geez, I feel kinda bad for him now. All this attention already, and he's brand new here. Is he really a sociopath?

dialogue.speaker: Mr. Han
dialogue.line: Hey, kids! On your way back from lunch?

dialogue.speaker: Student 7
dialogue.line: Oh, Mr. Han! You're looking great as always, sir!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. Han
dialogue.line: Haha, don't be silly.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. Han
dialogue.line: And try not to doze off next class!

dialogue.speaker: Student 8
dialogue.line: Gasp! Mr. Han is always so dreamy.

dialogue.speaker: Student 9
dialogue.line: I'm going to be crushed when Mr. Han gets married.

dialogue.speaker: Student 10
dialogue.line: Me too.

dialogue.speaker: Student 11
dialogue.line: Me too.

dialogue.speaker: Jukyung
dialogue.line: Bummer.

dialogue.speaker: Jukyung
dialogue.line: Why'd he have to end up at our school of all places?

dialogue.speaker: Jukyung
dialogue.line: Even the girl from the convenience store and our next-door neighbor think there are two of me. He won't recognize me, will he?

dialogue.speaker: Jukyung
dialogue.line: No way, no way. He won't know who I am. He can't!

dialogue.speaker: Friend 2
dialogue.line: Knock-knock! Anyone home?

dialogue.speaker: Friend 2
dialogue.line: Why do you look so down? The lip gloss I use is on sale today! Wanna come?

dialogue.speaker: Jukyung
dialogue.line: Oh, I totally forgot about that! Yeah, let's go!

dialogue.speaker: Friend 2
dialogue.line: Have you ever tried water tint? It's supposed to be amazing.

dialogue.speaker: Jukyung
dialogue.line: Maybe I should get some of that, too!

dialogue.speaker: Friend 2
dialogue.line: Their blush is out of this world, too.

dialogue.speaker: Jukyung
dialogue.line: I shouldn't have worn that bag to school that day.

summary: Jukyung is annoyed after an encounter with a handsome, cocky guy at a comic shop. The next day, she's mortified to wear an old middle school bag to school, only to discover the same guy, Suho Lee, is a new transfer student. She worries he might recognize her without makeup, while other students gossip about his looks, intelligence, and 'jerk' personality, before a friend distracts her with a makeup sale.
